title: angelica litoralis
intro: Angelica litoralis, also known as sea angelica or Chinese angelica, is a perennial plant in the carrot family, native to coastal areas of East Asia. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its rhizome and roots, which are rich in essential oils and contain compounds like ferulic acid and ligustilide. The health benefits of angelica litoralis include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and anti-bacterial properties, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, angelica litoralis is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as being added to soups and stews for its flavor and medicinal properties.
